heaviest_rainfall.status: The heaviest total rainfall occurred on 09 November 2025, dropping 47.89mm of rain over the 144.8 hour storm duration with a maximum rate of 24.6mm per hour.

heaviest_rainrate.status: On 02 September 2025, the rain fell at an exceptional rate, peaking at 34.3mm per hour, the heaviest downpour recorded.  A total of 21.19mm fell over the 15.0 hour storm.

longest_rain.status: The lengthiest precipitation event recorded spanned 144.8 hours on 09 November 2025, it was characterized by a peak rain intensity of 24.6mm per hour and a total rainfall of 47.89mm.

most_lightning.status: The highest recorded number of lightning strikes in a single day is {highest_count} on {highest_date} since records began on 11 April 2025.

storm.status: No storm activity at the moment.  The previous storm occurred on 02 May 2026 and lasted 1 day.

summary.description:
Today, a bit warmer for the inside temperature (up 2.0°C), cooler for the feels like temperature (down 2.5°C) and outside temperature (down 2.4°C), and more moisture-laden outside humidity (up 7%).

Compared to today, yesterday also had noticeable differences in light levels (up 15210 lux) and cloud levels (up 573 m).

The past week and month had observable variation in light levels (up 15828 lux), cloud levels (up 1700 m), and dew point temperature (down 3.1°C) when compared to today.

cloud levels.description:
Today’s average cloud levels is 572.6m lower than yesterday, 1699.9m lower than the past week, 1534.0m lower than the past month.

The cloud levels yesterday fell between 814m minimum and 3430m maximum, with an average of 1254.3m; weekly and monthly averages were marginally higher at 2950m and 2790m.

summary.summary: Inside; comfortable and pleasant temperatures. Outside; moderate and mild. Also, neither too dry nor too humid and winds will be practically absent. Drizzle or light rain possible, partial cloudiness with some periods of sun, and it’s dark. The weather may change rapidly and become worse.

washing.phrase: It is nighttime; if you have washing out then bring it in as it will probably get damper overnight.
